title: alnus orientalis f. tomentosa
intro: Alnus orientalis f. tomentosa, also known as the Oriental alder or hairy alder, is a subspecies of the alder tree native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alnus orientalis f. tomentosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health. Alnus orientalis f. tomentosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
